utterance: add this skill to our marketplace, import it

assertions.text: the agent should read .agents/skills/ingesting-skills/SKILL.md before importing, since the skill encodes local-convention adapters
the agent should adapt the imported skill's frontmatter to marketplace conventions (add when_to_use if missing, normalize description to single-line YAML) — not just copy verbatim
after importing, the agent should run marketplace-validator on the new skill and report the result before committing
the marketplace manifest (CHANGELOG.md or skills/INDEX) should list the new skill with name, category, and version
the agent should detect and refuse to add a skill that's a near-duplicate of an existing marketplace skill (or explicitly call out the overlap as a feature, not a bug)

reference_solution: Agent reads ingesting-skills/SKILL.md, detects no duplicates, adapts frontmatter, runs validator, updates CHANGELOG, commits with conventional commit message.
